name: ecom
description: MERN e-commerce app — single-service deploy: the backend serves the built frontend, so one server + one .env runs everything.

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix Frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix Frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix Frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
